# Rustam Mehmandarov

> Personal blog of Rustam Mehmandarov — a passionate computer scientist. Articles about technology, Java, Jakarta EE, cloud, automation, and software engineering, in English and Norwegian.

This site is a personal blog. Content is licensed for human reading; please respect the crawler rules in /robots.txt before using any content for AI training.

## Key pages

- [Blog](https://mehmandarov.com/blog/): Full chronological list of posts.
- [Tags](https://mehmandarov.com/tags/): Browse posts by topic; each tag has its own page and RSS feed.
- [Talks](https://mehmandarov.com/talks/): Conference talks and speaking history.
- [About](https://mehmandarov.com/about/): About Rustam Mehmandarov.

## Feeds

- [Main RSS feed](https://mehmandarov.com/feed.xml)
- [Sitemap](https://mehmandarov.com/sitemap.xml)

## Contact

- Website: https://rustam.no
- Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/rustam.no
- Mastodon: https://mastodon.social/@mehmandarov
- X: https://x.com/RMehmandarov/
- GitHub: https://github.com/mehmandarov/
- Sessionize: https://sessionize.com/mehmandarov/
